'''yajuchu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:tabification|tabification]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| y-j-ch
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:tabification|tabification]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| yajuchu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:yæjichith|yæjichith]] || [[word:yæjichij|yæjichij]] || [[word:yæjichish|yæjichish]] || [[word:yæjichi|yæjichi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:yajujuchuth|yajujuchuth]] || [[word:yajujuchuj|yajujuchuj]] || [[word:yajujuchush|yajujuchush]] || [[word:yajujuchu|yajujuchu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:yajuchuth|yajuchuth]] || [[word:yajuchuj|yajuchuj]] || [[word:yajuchush|yajuchush]] || [[word:yajuchu|yajuchu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:yajufchuth|yajufchuth]] || [[word:yajufchuj|yajufchuj]] || [[word:yajufchush|yajufchush]] || [[word:yajufchuf|yajufchuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:yajuchuthu|yajuchuthu]] || [[word:yajuchuju|yajuchuju]] || [[word:yajuchushu|yajuchushu]] || [[word:yajuchuku|yajuchuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:yajuchuth|yajuchuth]] || [[word:yajuchuj|yajuchuj]] || [[word:yajuchush|yajuchush]] || [[word:yajuchu|yajuchu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:yajuchuthul|yajuchuthul]] || [[word:yajuchujul|yajuchujul]] || [[word:yajuchushul|yajuchushul]] || [[word:yajuchukul|yajuchukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:yajuchuthuthu|yajuchuthuthu]] || [[word:yajuchujuju|yajuchujuju]] || [[word:yajuchushushu|yajuchushushu]] || [[word:yajuchuku|yajuchuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:yajuchuthun|yajuchuthun]] || [[word:yajuchujun|yajuchujun]] || [[word:yajuchushun|yajuchushun]] || [[word:yajuchukun|yajuchukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:yajuchuthuoro|yajuchuthuoro]] || [[word:yajuchujuoro|yajuchujuoro]] || [[word:yajuchushuoro|yajuchushuoro]] || [[word:yajuchukuoro|yajuchukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|28ebc72}}
